name: Inquirer.js (Interactive CLI Prompts)

auth.notes: CLI interactive prompts library; no auth

performance.notes: Waits for user input; no computational overhead; pure I/O

agent_readiness.notes: Interactive CLI prompts for Node.js. Prompt types: input, password, confirm, select (list), checkbox (multi-select), number, editor, expand. @inquirer/prompts v9+ modular package (separate from classic inquirer). Async/await API: const answer = await input({message: 'Name:'}). Validation, default values, filtering. TypeScript types. Clack (@clack/prompts) is a modern alternative with better UX. Used by create-react-app, create-vite, and many scaffolding tools.

gotchas: v9 @inquirer/prompts API differs from classic inquirer
Terminal compatibility issues on some CI environments
Clack has better modern UX (spinners, styled output)
best_when: CLI scaffolding tools requiring user input
One-time setup prompts for developer tools
avoid_when: When Clack's modern UX is preferred
summary: Inquirer.js is the standard interactive CLI prompts library for Node.js. Prompt types: input, password, confirm, select, checkbox, number, editor. @inquirer/prompts v9+ provides a modern modular async/await API. TypeScript types. Used by create-react-app, create-vite, and many scaffolding tools. Clack (@clack/prompts) is a modern alternative with better UX styling.
